title: CLI JSON show contract
description:
Groups the CLI-only `issue show` JSON contract changes (REQ-01..REQ-03) into a coherent milestone.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `issue show --json` exposes `short_id`, always-array `labels`/`dependencies`, and the unified `gates` array (REQ-01, REQ-02).
- [ ] Field projection (`--field`, `--fields`, multi-id) works against the finalized show response (REQ-03).
